title: llpsw Naruto Mod
description: Use the keyboard to release jutsu
body:
# **模组使用GeckoLib作为前置(Module uses GeckoLib as dependency)**
# **本模组是一款使用按键搓招的高版本火影忍者模组。**
**(This module is an advanced version of Naruto module that uses button rubs.)**

## **忍术系统(Ninjutsu system):**
1. 忍术书会告诉玩家是否学习过和忍术的按键，右键忍术书可以学习该忍术(Ninjutsu book will tell the player whether to learn and Ninjutsu button, right click Ninjutsu book can learn the Ninjutsu)；
2. 制作一个委托桌，然后右击委托桌获取委托信，通过做委托来获取钱币，然后到忍术商贩处购买忍术书(Make a commission table, then right click on the commission table to get a commission letter, make a commission to get coins, then go to a ninjutsu vendor to buy a ninjutsu book)；
3. 地图中随机刷新的 NPC，死亡后有概率掉落忍术书(NPC randomly respawned in the map. There is a chance to drop Ninjutsu books after death.)；
4. 学习过的忍术，按下默认按键 G 打开 GUI 中，会展示学过的忍术和对应按键(If you have learned Ninjutsu, press the default key G to open the GUI, and the learned Ninjutsu and corresponding keys will be displayed.)。

# **其余功能(remaining functions)**
- 默认按下 X，触发忍者跳，有查克拉则消耗一点查克拉，没有查克拉则消耗饥饿值(By default, press X to trigger Ninja Jump. If there is a chakra, it consumes one chakra. If there is no chakra, it consumes Hunger Points.)；
- 默认长按 C 键即可触发恢复查克拉(By default, pressing the C key will trigger the recovery of Chakra)；
- 默认双击跳跃键即可二段跳(By default, double-click the jump key to jump in two segments)；
- 默认奔跑触发忍者跑(Default Run triggers Ninja Run)。

# **写轮眼进化**
- 目前玩家濒死时有概率进化，觉醒万花筒时，自动解锁须佐能乎与随机一个万花筒瞳术(Currently, there is a probability of evolution when a player is dying. When he awakens Kaleidoscope, he will automatically unlock the ability to assist him and a random Kaleidoscope eye skill.)。

# **NPC玩法(NPC play)**
- 从背后靠近，在他没有看到你的时候，蹲下右键，可以打开它的背包(Approach from behind. When he doesn't see you, squat down and right click to open his backpack.)；
- NPC 在击杀生物后，可以获得经验，提升等级，最高 7 级(NPCs can gain EXP after killing creatures and increase their levels up to Level 7.)；
- 击伤他，当他只剩下 2 点生命值时会坐在地面，使用面包驯服，使其成为你的属下(Wound him. When he has only 2 HP left, he will sit on the ground and use Bread Taming to make him your subordinate.)；
- 属下的背包里含有面包时，他会自己使用回血(When a subordinate's backpack contains bread, he will use his own health recovery.)；
- 你可以蹲下右键你的属下，打开其背包，给你的属下装备盔甲，主副手武器(You can squat down and right click on your subordinate, open his backpack, equip your subordinate with armor, primary and secondary weapons)；
- 你可以直接右键你的属下，用于切换跟随/巡逻。（更像是守卫一个点，自动攻击靠近这个位置的生物）(You can right-click your subordinate directly to switch between follow/patrol. (More like guarding a point, automatically attacking creatures near that location));

# **道具(prop):**
- 起爆符:右键放置几乎透明的地雷(Detonator:Right-click to place an almost transparent mine)；
- 三种苦无(Three kinds of kunai)；
- 委托信[S、A级等对应下中上忍等职业],副手放任务道具主手拿委托，右键执行(Entrustment Letter [S, A, B, C, D levels correspond to lower, middle, shadow, etc.], the assistant puts the task item in the main hand to take the entrustment, right click to execute)。
- 各种考核卷轴，用于考核下中上忍等职业(All kinds of assessment scrolls, used to assess lower, middle and lower classes)；
- 钱币，用于购买忍术书，通过：【委托获得】【击杀npc获得】【在 NPC 后面按潜行+右键偷偷打开他的背包偷取】(Coins, used to purchase Ninjutsu books, through: [Obtained by Commission][Obtained by killing an NPC][Press Stealth + Right button behind an NPC to secretly open his backpack and steal])；
- 忍术书(jutsu book)；
- 一只写轮眼，拥有写轮眼的玩家（或者是宇智波一族的玩家）死亡后概率掉落，拾取并右键可以获得写轮眼，但是因为不是宇智波一族的查克拉消耗为 5 倍，NPC 也有低概率掉落(A Wheel Eye. Players with Wheel Eye (or Uchiha clan players) have a chance to drop it after death. Pick it up and right click to obtain Wheel Eye. However, since Chakra consumption for non-Uchiha clan players is 5 times higher, NPCs also have a low chance of dropping it.)；
- 血统：千手、旋涡、宇智波、平民(Bloodline: Thousand Hands, Vortex, Uchibo, Civilian)；
- 各种护额和胸甲。性价比针不戳(All kinds of forehead shields and breastplates. Good value for money.);
